title: BONNYCO Night Light Kids with Remote and Touch Control 16 Colours. Unicorn Baby Night Light with Timer, Kids Lamp Silicone BPA Free. Cute Lamp Nightlights for Bedroom, Gifts for Girls Boys
features: 16 COLOURS & 2 PROGRAMMES - Unicorn Led Night Light that changes colours with remote controller and touch sensor. Features 10 brightness intensities, flickering and breathing modes. Ideal lamp for nursery decor, kids bedroom and original gifts for girls and boys for Birthdays and Christmas

NIGHT LIGHT BABY WITH TIMER - Set the timer of this animal lamp for 15, 30 or 60 minutes and the touch light will turn off automatically. USB wire included of 31.49 in. Perfect kids night light gift for babies, newborns and toddlers

RUNTIME OVER 15 HOURS - Nightlights for children lasts up to 15 hours at maximum intensity with one colour or up to 12 hours using a programme mode. The battery can be charged while the night light for kids is on, unlike many others that need to be upside down, allowing you to continue using the night lamp while charging. The battery will be fully charged in 3-4 hours

NIGHTLIGHT FOR SWEET DREAMS - Cute lamps for kids’ bedrooms, large size 4.40 x 4.52 x 6.29 in. Made from 100% BPA free soft silicone that can be disassembled to be hand-washed, to keep it clean and hygienic. Boys and girls night light perfect birthdays and Christmas gifts for children, infants & newborns to keep them safe at night

USE OF THE REMOTE CONTROL - Turn on the childrens night light by pressing the "ON" button on its base and you will be able to use the remote control normally. After 20 minutes of being off, it can no longer be turned on with the remote control and it will have to be switched on from the lamp. This helps the battery to last longer
description: Product Description Remote control with multiple functions: 16 different colours 10 brightness intensities to suit any time of the day 2 different modes to change the automatic colour. Flash mode and transition mode Programmable timer with 3 settings Night light with remote control Ideal to protect your baby from the dark of night when he is sleeping. The night light has many uses since thanks to its remote control you can configure different colors, light intensities and program it to turn itself off. The perfect companion for parents who need a dim light at night with their babies. It will also be the perfect option to accompany your child when he begins to sleep alone. This night light can be taken anywhere as it does not break and is very easy to wash! USB Cable It includes a 1 metre USB cable to charge the lamp by connecting it to a wall charger or power bank. Battery Life The battery lasts for more than 15 hours on a single charge. In addition, you can use it while it charges. Timer function The lamp timer can be set to 15 ', 30' or 60 ' . The light will turn off by itself after this time to sleep peacefully for the rest of the night. Touch Sensor With the touch function you can turn the lamp on and off and change the colour with a soft tap. With the first touch it will turn white, with the second touch the colour blur mode is activated! BPA Free 100% Silicone child light with a very soft feel. Safe product for babies and children thanks to its BPA-free silicone. Nice Packaging Careful packaging with great detail that makes it a perfect gift for children of any age. Characteristics: Measures 4.40 x 4.52 x 6.29 in 1200mAh Lithium Battery Battery use is optimized due to its automatic shutdown function after 20 minutes when deactivated with the remote control. Charging time 3 to 4 hours. Detachable, easy-to-hand wash lamp to keep it clean and hygienic.
